one_time_description: Transfer to deferred revenue for CMHC, Government of Canada, and Province of BC IRSP funding received but not yet recognized
economic_notes: Nation holds interests in multiple commercial enterprises including timber holdings (49.5%), forestry LP (49.5%), fisheries LP (49.9%), market, lodge, and other entities. Audit qualified due to unavailability of financial records for Pacheedaht Forestry Limited, Pacheedaht Fisheries Company Inc., and Queesto Community Forest Ltd.
notes: Audit qualified due to inability to obtain sufficient evidence on investments in Pacheedaht Forestry Limited, Pacheedaht Fisheries Company Inc., and Queesto Community Forest Ltd. Prior period restatement: buildings amortization rate changed retroactively from 10-year to 25-year straight-line, increasing 2021 TCA by $1,137,654 and restating accumulated surplus. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $3,165,008 + Gov of Canada $3,024,475 + CMHC $1,588,400 + Province of BC $1,354,973 + Province of BC Treaty $825,000 + FNHA $731,425 + FNESC $349,236 + Coast Salish Employment $69,844 + BCABCC $106,374 = approximately $7,764,881 less items that may be non-governmental. OSR calculated as total revenue minus total government transfers. No schedule of remuneration included in the document.
